tasks.name: Register a 7-year-old for the earliest beginner swim class after 4 PM under $120
tasks.description: Find kids’ swim lessons, filter for ages 6–8 at Beginner 1 level starting at or after 4:00 PM and costing no more than $120, then register the child for the class with the soonest start date.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the “Programs” option in the main navigation menu.
In the dropdown or programs list, click on “Swim Lessons for Kids.”
In the age group filter on the lessons page, select the option labeled “Ages 6–8.”
In the skill level filter, select the checkbox for “Beginner 1.”
In the price filter or slider, set the maximum price to “$120.”
In the start time or time-of-day filter, choose “4:00 PM or later.”
In the sort dropdown, select “Start Date - Soonest First.”

Click on the first class card in the sorted results, then on the class details page click the “Register” button; fill in the form with the child’s name, date of birth (e.g., 05/10/2017), select the “Resident” pricing option, enter the parent’s phone number (e.g., 555-123-4567) and email (e.g., parent@example.com), and click the “Complete Registration” button.

tasks.name: Reserve the cheapest indoor lap lane tomorrow between 6:00–7:00 AM under $15
tasks.description: Use the lap lane reservation system to find indoor lanes available tomorrow between 6:00–7:00 AM, filter to options that cost no more than $15, sort by price, and reserve the cheapest available lane.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the “Lap Lane Reservations” link in the main navigation or homepage tiles.
Use the date picker on the reservations page to select tomorrow’s date.
In the time range filter, set the start time to “6:00 AM” and the end time to “7:00 AM.”
In the pool type filter, select “Indoor Pool.”
In the price filter or maximum fee field, set the maximum price to “$15.”
In the sort dropdown, select “Price - Low to High.”
Click on the first lane slot card in the sorted results (the cheapest indoor lane in that time window).

On the lane details or booking panel, click “Reserve Lane,” enter the name “Alex Rivera,” select “1 swimmer” from the swimmers dropdown, enter a contact phone number (e.g., 555-222-3333), and click the “Confirm Reservation” button.

tasks.name: Purchase a 1-month family membership with pool and fitness access under $120 that has the latest closing time
tasks.description: Find family memberships for 1 month, filter for plans that include both pool and fitness center access costing no more than $120, compare the listed weekday closing times for at least two plans, and purchase the plan with the latest weekday closing time at or after 10:00 PM (choosing the cheapest if there is a tie).
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the “Memberships” option in the main navigation menu.
On the memberships page, use the membership type filter to select “Family.”
Use the duration filter to select “1 Month.”
In the features or access filter, check the boxes for both “Pool Access” and “Fitness Center.”
In the price filter, set the maximum price to “$120.”

From the filtered list, click on the first membership card to open its details page, note the listed weekday closing time (e.g., “Weekday Hours: 6 AM–10 PM”), then use the back navigation to return to the membership list and repeat this process for at least one more membership card that meets the same filters.

After viewing at least two plan details, identify which plan under $120 that includes both “Pool Access” and “Fitness Center” has the latest weekday closing time at or after 10:00 PM; if more than one plan closes at the same latest time, choose the cheapest one among them and click its membership card.
On the chosen membership’s detail page, click the “Purchase Membership” button.

In the purchase form, enter the primary adult’s name (e.g., “Jordan Lee”), set the membership start date to the next upcoming Monday using the date picker, fill in a contact email (e.g., jordan@example.com), and click the “Complete Purchase” button.

tasks.name: Reserve a Saturday birthday party for 15 kids with a private room and pizza under $350
tasks.description: Navigate to party rentals, select a specific Saturday date, specify a group size of 15 kids, filter for birthday packages that include a private party room and pizza, sort by price, and reserve the cheapest option costing less than $350.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the “Parties & Rentals” item in the main navigation.
On the rentals page, click the “Birthday Parties” category or tile.
Use the date picker to select a Saturday date (for example, choose “Saturday, July 18, 2026”).
In the party size or number of guests field, enter “15” as the number of children attending.
In the amenities or package options filter, check the boxes for “Private Party Room” and “Pizza Included.”
In the sort dropdown, select “Price - Low to High.”
From the sorted list, click on the first party package that shows a total price under “$350.”

On the selected package’s detail page, click “Reserve This Party,” then fill out the reservation form with the organizer’s name (e.g., “Maria Chen”), phone number (e.g., 555-444-7777), email (e.g., maria@example.com), and a preferred party start time of “2:00 PM,” and click the “Submit Reservation Request” button.

tasks.name: Add three evening open swim sessions next week (indoor and outdoor) to My Schedule
tasks.description: Use the pool schedule to find open swim sessions in the next calendar week starting at or after 5:00 PM, choose at least one indoor and one outdoor session on different weekdays, and add a total of three sessions to the user’s My Schedule list.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the “Pool Schedule” or “Schedule” link in the main navigation.
On the schedule page, use the week navigation control (such as a “Next Week” button or arrow) to move to the next calendar week.
In the activity type filter, deselect all other options and select only “Open Swim.”
Use the time or time-of-day filter to show sessions that start at “5:00 PM or later.”
On the calendar for Monday of that week, locate an open swim session labeled as taking place in the indoor pool and click its “Add to My Schedule” or similar button.
On the calendar for Wednesday of that week, locate an open swim session labeled as taking place in the outdoor pool and click its “Add to My Schedule” button.
On the calendar for Friday of that week, select any remaining open swim session that starts at or after 5:00 PM and click its “Add to My Schedule” button.
Click on the “My Schedule” link or icon in the page header or sidebar to open the personal schedule page showing the selected sessions.

tasks.name: Buy 5 digital guest passes with the lowest total price under $60
tasks.description: Go to the passes section, filter for digital guest passes, identify an option that provides exactly 5 visits for less than $60 (either as a 5-visit pass or a quantity of single-visit passes), choose the cheapest qualifying option, and complete the purchase.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the “Buy Passes” or “Passes” link in the main navigation.
On the passes page, use the pass type filter to select “Guest Passes.”
In the format or delivery filter, select “Digital Pass.”

From the displayed digital guest pass products, identify any option that can provide exactly 5 visits (for example, a product labeled “5-Visit Digital Guest Pass” or a “Single-Visit Digital Guest Pass” where quantity can be set to 5); if multiple options allow 5 visits, choose the one where the cost for 5 visits is the lowest but remains under $60, and click that product card.
On the selected product’s detail page, if it is a single-visit pass, enter “5” in the quantity field; if it is a 5-visit pass product, leave the quantity set to “1.”
Click the “Add to Cart” button.

Click the cart icon in the header to open the cart, then click the “Checkout” button; on the checkout form, enter the purchaser’s name (e.g., “Sam Patel”) and email (e.g., sam@example.com), select “Credit/Debit Card” as the payment method, and click the “Place Order” button.

tasks.name: Enroll in a weekend lifeguard certification course under $300 that ends before June 30 and includes CPR
tasks.description: Find lifeguard certification courses held on weekends only, filter to those that cost less than $300, end before June 30, and include CPR/First Aid, sort by shortest total duration, and enroll in the shortest qualifying course.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the “Training & Certifications” option in the main navigation.
On the training page, click on the “Lifeguard Certification” category or tile.
Use the day-of-week filter to select “Weekends Only.”
In the end date or session date filter, choose the option for sessions that end “Before June 30, 2026” (or select an end date of June 29, 2026 in a date field).
In the price filter, set the maximum price to “$300.”
In the features or course options filter, check the box for “Includes CPR/First Aid.”
In the sort dropdown, select “Total Duration - Shortest First.”
Click on the first course card in the sorted results list (the shortest weekend course that meets the filters).

On the course detail page, click the “Enroll” button, fill in the participant’s name (e.g., “Taylor Brooks”), date of birth (e.g., 03/15/2005), phone number (e.g., 555-666-8888), email (e.g., taylor@example.com), check any required waiver agreement box, and click the “Complete Enrollment” button.

tasks.name: Register for two different evening aqua fitness classes on different days under $20 each with no time overlap
tasks.description: Find aqua fitness classes in the evening (6–8 PM) that cost less than $20 per session, choose one class on Monday or Tuesday and a different class type on Wednesday, Thursday, or Friday with non-overlapping times, add both to the cart, and proceed to checkout.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the “Fitness Classes” option in the main navigation.
On the fitness classes page, click the “Aqua Fitness” subcategory or filter.
In the time-of-day filter, select “Evening (6:00–8:00 PM).”
In the price filter, set the maximum price per class to “$20.”

From the filtered classes, scroll and click on a class that takes place on a Monday or Tuesday between 6:00 and 8:00 PM (for example, “Aqua Zumba – Monday 6:30 PM”); on the class detail page, click the “Add to Cart” button.
Use the “Back to Aqua Fitness Classes” link or the browser’s back button to return to the filtered class list.

From the remaining classes, choose a different class type on a different weekday (Wednesday, Thursday, or Friday) whose listed time does not overlap the time of the first selected class (for example, choose a 7:30 PM class if the first was at 6:00 PM), and click its class card to open the detail page.
On the second class’s detail page, click the “Add to Cart” button.
Click the cart icon in the header, then click the “Checkout” button on the cart page, and finally click the “Confirm Registration” button to complete registration for both classes.

website_type: community aquatic center and swim programs
